state.name: New York
state.agency_full: New York State Department of Environmental Conservation

documents.title: 6 NYCRR Part 375 — Remedial Program Regulations
documents.description: Primary New York State regulations for environmental remediation, covering Inactive Hazardous Waste Disposal Sites, Voluntary Cleanup Program, and Environmental Restoration Programs. Establishes cleanup criteria.

documents.title: Voluntary Cleanup Program (VCP) — Overview
documents.description: NYSDEC program allowing voluntary investigation and remediation of contaminated sites in exchange for regulatory closure. Provides liability protection upon issuance of a Certificate of Completion.

documents.title: NY Construction General Permit (GP-0-20-001)
documents.description: NYSDEC SPDES general permit for construction sites disturbing 1+ acres. Requires a Stormwater Pollution Prevention Plan (SWPPP) and inspection program. Covers water quality and quantity controls.

documents.title: NY MS4 General Permit (GP-0-15-003)
documents.description: NYSDEC SPDES general permit for small municipal separate storm sewer systems. Requires Stormwater Management Programs with six minimum control measures and annual compliance reporting.

documents.title: NY Stormwater Management Design Manual (2015)
documents.description: NYSDEC guidance for design of stormwater management practices for new development and redevelopment. The technical reference for SPDES permit compliance, BMP sizing, and water quality treatment.

documents.title: NY Brownfield Cleanup Program (BCP) — Site Assessment
documents.description: NYSDEC Brownfield Cleanup Program resources for Phase I and II assessments, including state-specific AAI guidance, BCP eligibility criteria, and environmental investigation work plans.

documents.title: NY Environmental Site Remediation Database (ENSR)
documents.description: NYSDEC online database of all sites in the State Superfund, VCP, BCP, and ERP programs. Essential for records reviews during Phase I ESAs.
